name: Season 1: Platinum Guild Challenger Trophy
description: Earned when the PvP season ends and your guild team's placement is 1st on the Guild Challenger League leaderboard.

name: Season 1: Bronze Guild Challenger Trophy
description: Earned when the PvP season ends and your guild team's placement is between 101st and 250th on the Guild Challenger League leaderboard.

name: Season 4: Gold Guild Challenger Trophy
description: Earned when the PvP season ends and your guild team's placement is between 2nd and 25th on the Guild Challenger League leaderboard.

name:
Café Drink Station
<c=@flavor>Provides drinks for delivery to café customers.</c>

Café Transporter
<c=@flavor>When this decoration is placed, café customers will enter and exit from it instead of from the waypoint.</c>

Café Chair
<c=@flavor>Café customers will sit here to order! Note that customers will have difficulty reaching seats high off the ground.</c>

Café Food Station
<c=@flavor>Provides food to deliver to café customers.</c>

Café Souvenir Station
<c=@flavor>Provides trinkets to deliver to café customers.</c>

Café Console
<c=@flavor>Handles testing, opening, and upgrades for your café.</c>

Café Guide Beacon
<c=@flavor>Café customers will follow beacons to avoid obstacles on the way to seating.</c>
